phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para comprar entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah PAH-rah kohm-PRAHR en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the lobby, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the lobby, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if combined tickets with birthplace house are sold here
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿venden entradas combinadas con la Casa Natal?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, BEHN-den en-TRAH-dahs kohm-bee-NAH-dahs kohn lah KAH-sah nah-TAHL?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, available at this ticket desk.

responses.english: Yes, available at this ticket desk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent audio guide
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo alquilar la audioguía del museo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, DON-deh PWEH-doh al-kee-LAR lah ow-dyoh-GEE-ah del moo-SEH-oh?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket desk itself, next to the entrance.

responses.english: At the ticket desk itself, next to the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En la taquilla principal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the courtyard café is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿me indica dónde está la cafetería del patio?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, meh een-DEE-kah DOHN-deh ehs-TAH lah kah-feh-teh-REE-ah dehl PAH-tee-oh?

likely_response.local: Tras la sala principal, acceso directo al patio.
likely_response.pronunciation: TRAHS LAH SAH-lah preen-thee-PAHL ahth-THEH-soh dee-REHTH-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: Behind the main room, direct access to the courtyard.

responses.english: Behind the main room, direct access to the courtyard.
responses.phonetic: TRAHS LAH SAH-lah preen-thee-PAHL ahth-THEH-soh dee-REHTH-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh
responses.local: Tras la sala principal, acceso directo al patio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibition is located
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿en qué sala está la exposición temporal?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-pe, en ke SAH-lah es-TAH la eks-po-see-SYOHN tem-po-RAHL?

likely_response.local: Sala temporal, al fondo a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAH-lah tehm-poh-RAHL AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: First floor, room number three according to the map.

responses.english: First floor, room number three according to the map.
responses.phonetic: SAH-lah tehm-poh-RAHL AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Sala temporal, al fondo a la derecha.
